_meta.title: Central Motor Vehicles Rules (CMVR) 1989 — Common Offence Rules
_meta.description: Key CMVR rules relevant to common traffic violations, linked to MVA penalty sections
_meta.source: Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 (as amended up to 2023)

rules.title: Speed limits for different classes of motor vehicles
rules.description: Maximum speed limits as per vehicle class and road type (expressway, highway, city)
rules.penalty: Rs 1000 for first offence, Rs 2000 for repeat

rules.title: Protective headgear (helmet standards)
rules.description: Specifications for ISI marked helmets (BIS IS 4151:2015). Both rider and pillion must wear.
rules.penalty: Rs 1000 + 3 months licence suspension

rules.title: Safety belts (seat belt requirements)
rules.description: All front and rear seat occupants must wear seat belts. Vehicles must have ISI marked belts.
rules.penalty: Rs 1000 for driver and each passenger not wearing belt

rules.title: Seating capacity and restrictions on passengers
rules.description: No person shall drive or allow to be driven a motor vehicle carrying passengers exceeding seating capacity.
rules.penalty: Rs 1000 + Rs 100 per extra passenger

rules.title: Validity of registration certificate
rules.description: RC valid for 15 years for non-transport, 5 years for transport. Renewal mandatory.
rules.penalty: Rs 5000 for first offence, Rs 10000 for repeat

rules.title: Emission standards (pollution under control certificate)
rules.description: Bharat Stage VI (BS-VI) norms. PUCC valid for 1 year for vehicles > 1 year old.
rules.penalty: Rs 10000 for first offence, Rs 10000 for repeat

rules.title: Form of driving licence
rules.description: DL must contain photo, signature, vehicle classes authorized, validity dates.
rules.penalty: Rs 5000 for driving without valid DL

rules.title: Standards for rear view mirrors
rules.description: Minimum 1 left-side rear view mirror for 2W, 2 mirrors (left+right) for 4W mandatory.
rules.penalty: Rs 1000 for improper/missing mirrors

rules.title: Use of horn and silencer
rules.description: Multi-toned, harsh, shrill horns prohibited. Silencer mandatory, must not be removed.
rules.penalty: Rs 1000 for improper horn, Rs 1000 for no/tampered silencer

rules.title: Parking lights
rules.description: Vehicles must have proper white front lights and red rear lights.
rules.penalty: Rs 500 for non-compliance

rules.title: Minimum age for driving motor vehicles
rules.description: Minimum 16 years for 2W <50cc, 18 years for other vehicles, 20 years for transport vehicles.
rules.penalty: Rs 5000 + guardian/owner liable under MVA 199A

rules.title: Display of registration marks
rules.description: Number plates must be in prescribed font (HSRP/high-security), clearly visible, not obscured.
rules.penalty: Rs 5000 for improper/missing number plate

rules.title: Use of mobile phones while driving
rules.description: Drivers prohibited from using handheld mobile phones. Hands-free allowed.
rules.penalty: Rs 1000 for first offence, Rs 2000 for repeat

rules.title: Carriage of goods on public service vehicles
rules.description: Goods exceeding prescribed weight or dimension limits prohibited.
rules.penalty: Rs 2000 + Rs 1000 per extra ton

rules.title: Grant of learner's licence
rules.description: LL valid for 6 months. Must be accompanied by valid DL holder during practice.
rules.penalty: Rs 5000 if LL holder drives alone

rules.title: Colour of lights shown by vehicles
rules.description: Front: white/yellow. Rear: red. No other colors permitted (no blue/green/multicolor).
rules.penalty: Rs 500 for non-compliant lights

rules.title: Fire extinguisher in transport vehicles
rules.description: All transport vehicles must carry functional fire extinguisher.
rules.penalty: Rs 2000 for missing/non-functional extinguisher

rules.title: Restrictions on towing
rules.description: Towing permitted only with valid tow bar. Weight restrictions apply.
rules.penalty: Rs 2000 for improper towing

rules.title: Standards for windscreen and glasses
rules.description: Windscreen and windows must allow >70% visible light transmission. No dark films.
rules.penalty: Rs 500 for violating VLT norms

rules.title: Insurance certificate validity
rules.description: Valid third-party insurance mandatory. Must be carried while driving.
rules.penalty: Rs 2000 for first offence, Rs 4000 for repeat + up to 3 months imprisonment

rules.title: Cabin requirements for drivers
rules.description: Driver's seat must have proper backrest, visibility, and comfort specifications.
rules.penalty: Rs 1000 for non-compliant driver cabin

rules.title: First aid kit in transport vehicles
rules.description: All transport vehicles must carry first aid box with prescribed contents.
rules.penalty: Rs 1000 for missing/inadequate first aid kit

rules.title: Temporary registration
rules.description: Temporary registration valid for 1 month. Must apply for permanent RC within this period.
rules.penalty: Rs 5000 if driving beyond temporary RC validity

rules.title: Use of high beam/low beam headlights
rules.description: High beam prohibited in city/traffic. Must dip to low beam when approaching oncoming vehicle within 200m.
rules.penalty: Rs 500 for misuse of high beam
